opinion.h4: SCHROEDER ET AL. v. WILLIAMS ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEBRASKA. No. 357. Decided November 6, 1961.
opinion.p: James A. Lake, Sr. and Roy Harrop for appellants.
Charles Thone and Clark O'Hanlon for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MURPHY ET AL. v. WATERFRONT COMMISSION OF NEW YORK HARBOR. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 362. Decided November 6, 1961.
William P. Sirignano and Irving Malchman for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
